name: vince-mp-cli
description: Local JSON CLI for WeChat Mini Program automation through miniprogram-automator — persistent session (one connect, stable uids), one-command connect, shorthands, scan/doctor/env/logs
author: Vince

scripts.lint: node --check bin/vince-mp.js && node --check src/*.js && node --check test/*.test.js && node --check tests/*.test.js
